name: As Time Goes By
overview: Thirty years ago, on the night of the Mid-Autumn Festival, three childhood friends got drunk and did something disgraceful. After the incident was exposed, they left town and went separate ways. Thirty years later, they meet again and are forced to deal with the chains of memory...

trailers.title: 好日子｜第1集預告｜那些年嘅好日子！今時今日又會點？！｜黃智賢｜陳煒｜張達倫
